role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no text on signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and lighting appropriate for the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Betula, Picea) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, sign mounting styles, and infrastructure quality.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized camera generation artifacts and cross-domain infrastructure standards.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Norway by leveraging the yellow center line (regulatory/meta) and boreal vegetation (landscape/botanics) to distinguish it from similar candidates like Canada and Sweden. The agents adhered well to their roles, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of birch/pine mix and overcast sky match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification (Downy Birch, Norway Spruce) is consistent with visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Yellow center line and sign backing accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera artifacts and road texture descriptions are accurate.
